A Great Neovim Post

This is the introduction. It explains what the post is about and why you should care about a Lua-based plugin manager.

Why bother

Plugin managers in Neovim have gone through several generations. The latest wave focuses on lazy-loading and declarative configuration.

Here is a second meaningful paragraph that adds substance so Readability can find a real article body to extract instead of falling back on the whole document.

Conclusion

Try it out and report back.

Footer junk that should not appear in the extract.
